meta.title: Commercial Electrical Services Charlotte NC | Johnson's Electric
meta.description: Reliable commercial electricians in Charlotte, NC. Office wiring, lighting upgrades, panel installations, and code compliance for businesses of all sizes. Call (704) 555-0199.
meta.og_title: Commercial Electrical Services | Johnson's Electric of Charlotte
meta.og_description: Charlotte's trusted commercial electricians. From tenant build-outs to lighting retrofits: licensed, insured, and built for business. Request a quote today.

hero.label: Commercial Electrical Services
hero.heading: Electrical Solutions Built for Charlotte Businesses
hero.subheading: Downtime costs money. Johnson's Electric delivers fast, reliable commercial electrical work with minimal disruption to your operations, done right the first time.

intro.label: Why Businesses Choose Us
intro.heading: Commercial Electrical Work That Keeps Your Business Running
intro.body1: Commercial electrical projects are complex, involving code compliance, coordination with multiple trades, inspections, and tight deadlines. Johnson's Electric has the experience and licensing to handle commercial projects of all sizes, from small offices to large retail and industrial facilities.
intro.body2: We understand that your facility can't be down for long. That's why we schedule work around your business hours, communicate clearly at every stage, and complete projects on time. Whether you're building out a new space or upgrading an existing facility, we bring the same professionalism every time.
intro.image_alt: Commercial electrician working in an office building

services.label: Commercial Electrical Services
services.heading: What We Do for Charlotte Businesses
services.subheading: From small office suites to large commercial facilities, we handle every electrical need with the expertise your business demands.

items.title: Tenant Build-Outs & Renovations
items.description: Opening a new location or renovating an existing space? We handle all electrical work for commercial build-outs, including new circuits, lighting, panel installations, and code-compliant wiring.

items.title: Commercial Lighting Upgrades
items.description: Upgrade to LED lighting and smart controls to reduce energy costs and improve workplace productivity. We retrofit existing fixtures or design entirely new lighting systems for your space.

items.title: Electrical Panel Upgrades
items.description: Undersized panels limit your business's electrical capacity and create safety hazards. We upgrade commercial panels to handle increased loads from new equipment, EV charging, and expanding operations.

items.title: Outlets, Circuits & Power
items.description: Ensure every workstation, piece of equipment, and common area has the power it needs. We install dedicated circuits, GFCI-protected outlets, and high-amperage connections for commercial equipment.

items.title: Emergency & Safety Systems
items.description: Keep your employees and customers safe with properly installed and maintained emergency lighting, exit signs, fire alarm integration, and carbon monoxide detection systems.

items.title: Electrical Maintenance & Repairs
items.description: Prevent costly breakdowns with scheduled electrical maintenance. We inspect, test, and service commercial electrical systems to catch problems before they cause downtime.

benefits.label: The Commercial Advantage
benefits.heading: Why Charlotte Businesses Trust Johnson's Electric
benefits.subheading: Commercial electrical work requires a partner who understands your industry, your deadlines, and the consequences of delays. We deliver.

items.title: Licensed for Commercial Projects
items.description: Our electricians hold the appropriate licenses and certifications for commercial work in North Carolina, including experience with commercial NEC codes, OSHA requirements, and AHJ coordination.

items.title: Minimal Business Disruption
items.description: We schedule work to minimize impact on your operations, including after-hours, overnight, and weekend availability. Your business stays open and your customers stay happy.

items.title: Code Compliance Guaranteed
items.description: All commercial work is performed to current NEC and local code standards. We pull all required permits and handle inspections, so you never have to worry about compliance issues.

items.title: Clear Project Communication
items.description: You'll always know where your project stands. We provide clear timelines, daily status updates on larger projects, and a single point of contact to answer any questions.

items.title: Competitive Commercial Pricing
items.description: We offer competitive pricing for commercial projects of all sizes, with detailed written proposals so you can plan your budget with confidence. No change orders without prior approval.

items.title: Trusted by Charlotte's Business Community
items.description: Since 2003, we've built lasting relationships with property managers, general contractors, and business owners throughout the Charlotte area. Our reputation speaks for itself.

process.label: How Commercial Projects Work
process.heading: Our Commercial Project Process
process.subheading: Larger projects need a clear process. Here's how we take a commercial electrical job from initial consultation to final inspection.
process.image_alt: Commercial electricians completing a project walkthrough
process.highlight_text: We've completed commercial projects in office buildings, retail centers, restaurants, warehouses, and healthcare facilities throughout Charlotte.

steps.title: Site Assessment & Scope Review
steps.description: A licensed commercial electrician visits your facility to assess the project scope, review plans, and identify any code considerations or utility requirements.

steps.title: Detailed Written Proposal
steps.description: We provide a comprehensive written proposal with itemized costs, project timeline, and scope of work. No surprises; everything is documented before a single wire is touched.

steps.title: Permit Coordination
steps.description: We pull all necessary commercial building permits and coordinate with the Authority Having Jurisdiction (AHJ) and utility company as needed.

steps.title: Scheduled Installation
steps.description: Work is scheduled around your business operations. We coordinate with your team and any other trades on the project to ensure a smooth installation.

steps.title: Inspection & Sign-Off
steps.description: All work is inspected and signed off by the appropriate authorities. You receive complete project documentation, including permits, inspection records, and warranty information.

faq.label: Commercial FAQs
faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subheading: Common questions from Charlotte business owners and property managers about our commercial electrical services.

items.question: Do you work after business hours to avoid disruption?
items.answer: Yes. We offer after-hours, overnight, and weekend scheduling for commercial projects where business operations must continue. Additional fees may apply for after-hours work, and we will discuss this upfront in your proposal.

items.question: Can you handle electrical work during a tenant build-out?
items.answer: Absolutely. Commercial build-outs are one of our specialties. We coordinate with general contractors, handle all electrical rough-in and finish work, pull permits, and ensure everything passes final inspection on schedule.

items.question: What size commercial projects do you take on?
items.answer: We handle commercial projects ranging from small office suites to large retail and industrial facilities. Our team has experience with single-phase and three-phase systems, high-amperage service entrances, and complex multi-tenant buildings.

items.question: How do you handle commercial emergency calls?
items.answer: We maintain 24/7 emergency dispatch for commercial clients. Electrical failures that shut down your business are treated as top priority, and we dispatch a licensed electrician as quickly as possible regardless of the hour.

items.question: Do you offer maintenance contracts for commercial facilities?
items.answer: Yes. We offer preventive maintenance agreements for commercial facilities, including scheduled inspections, panel testing, and priority response for emergency calls. Contact us to discuss a plan tailored to your facility.

items.question: Are you insured for commercial work?
items.answer: Yes. Johnson's Electric carries full general liability insurance and workers' compensation coverage appropriate for commercial projects. We can provide certificates of insurance to your general contractor or property manager upon request.

cta.label: Ready to Get Started?
cta.heading: Schedule Your Commercial Electrical Project
cta.body: Get a detailed commercial proposal from Charlotte's most trusted commercial electricians. We respond to all commercial inquiries within 2 business hours.

checklist.text: Free on-site assessment for commercial projects
Detailed written proposals with no surprises
